data.title: US crypto chief predicts banks and crypto will unite into a single digital asset industry; addresses stablecoin yield and crypto legislation delays in the Senate at WEF in Davos.
data.description: During an interview at the World Economic Forum in Davos, David Sacks discussed the controversies surrounding stablecoin yield and the legislative stagnation in the US Senate regarding crypto market structure.

data.title: Ipsos launches Horizons, a strategy to strengthen global leadership through transformation and growth. #PressRelease
data.description: The latest report reveals that the global economy grew by 4.9% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations due to increased consumer spending and government investments. The tech industry saw a significant boost, with a 12% growth in revenue. However, the manufacturing sector saw a slight decline, with a 2.5% decrease in production. The unemployment rate also dropped to a record low of 3.8%, indicating a positive trend in job creation. Analysts predict continued growth in the coming months, with experts forecasting a 6% increase in global GDP by the end of the year. This positive outlook is attributed to the rising demand for goods and services, as well as the ongoing support from various stimulus measures implemented by governments worldwide.

data.title: EQT AB's 2025 report highlights strong execution and progress with highest realization year ever.
data.description: In 2025, EQT had a year of significant accomplishments in Stockholm. Despite a turbulent market, they achieved their best year for realizations ever1. The company made impactful investments in various thematic opportunities, showcasing their commitment to execution and progress.

data.title: S&P 500 surges over 1% as Trump withdraws EU tariff threat; Fear & Greed index at 'Neutral' zone. Stocks rise, with Johnson & Johnson beats Q4 earnings. Netflix shares up. (Word count: 28)
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed an improvement in market sentiment, staying in the "Neutral" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks saw gains, with the S&P 500 rising over 1% as President Donald Trump withdrew the latest round of tariff threats. The planned tariffs on EU countries were canceled after a "very productive" meeting with NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte. Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) exceeded expectations in fourth-quarter earnings reporting. Find the full story on Benzinga.com.
Barclays lifts Barry Callebaut’s price target to CHF 1,250, up from CHF 1,200.

data.title: Procter & Gamble, Abbott Laboratories, & 3 other stocks to watch; Abbott expected to report $1.50/share earnings on $11.81B revenue.
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up this morning, with investor attention likely on the following stocks today: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT) is anticipated to announce quarterly earnings of $1.50 per share and revenue of $11.81 billion pre-market. In after-hours trading, Abbott shares increased by 0.2% to $121.01. Kinder Morgan Inc. (NYSE: KMI) also reported positive earnings. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Tryg launches DKK 1bn share buyback program valid until end of 2026, acquiring up to 10% of share capital starting Jan 22.
data.description: A share buyback initiative has been initiated based on the approval given to acquire treasury shares during the general meeting held on 26 March 2025. This authorization remains in effect until 31 December 2026, allowing Tryg to purchase shares worth a total nominal value of approximately DKK 300,000,000, equivalent to around 10% of its share capital. The buyback program will commence on 22 January 2026 and conclude by 13 May 2026.

data.title: Tryg Forsikring A/S to publish full Annual Report 2025 on Feb 5, 2026. Report for Tryg Group available on Tryg.com.
data.description: The complete Annual Report for the year 2025 from Tryg Forsikring will be released on February 5, 2026. The Annual Report for 2025 covering the entire Tryg Group can currently be accessed on Tryg.com.

data.title: ONWARD Medical implants 2 more BCI devices for spinal cord injury patients, bringing total human implants to 7.
data.description: Eindhoven, Netherlands, on January 22, 2026 - ONWARD Medical N.V. (Euronext: ONWD, US ADR: ONWRY), a leading neurotechnology company in spinal cord stimulation therapies, has successfully provided their investigational ARC-BCI Therapy to two more individuals with spinal cord injuries. With these latest procedures, the total count of human implants now stands at seven, reinforcing the company's position as a pioneer in developing brain-computer interface (BCI) platforms for restoring movement in paralyzed individuals.

data.title: Immfly will provide Eutelsat's OneWeb LEO high-speed connectivity to narrowbody LCC/ULCC fleets by 2026, with installations in 24-30 hours, using Gogo's antenna and Immfly's server Equilux Aero, benefiting LCCs/ULCCs worldwide.
data.description: Immfly will be providing Eutelsat's OneWeb state-of-the-art Low Earth Orbit (LEO) high-speed connectivity by 2026. The installation process will be completed within 24 to 30 hours on aircraft. The technology will include Gogo's advanced electronically steered antenna and Immfly's versatile server Equilux Aero. This innovative solution is designed to enhance the connectivity for Low-Cost Carriers (LCCs) and Ultra Low-Cost Carriers (ULCCs).

data.title: EQT acquires Coller Capital with nearly USD 50 billion in assets, entering secondaries market for strategic evolution.
data.description: EQT has announced its plan to purchase Coller Capital, a prominent global secondaries firm managing approximately USD 50 billion in total assets under management. This acquisition will bolster EQT's goal of establishing the most appealing private markets company by adding Coller Capital's expertise in managing institutional, private wealth, and insurance-related capital.

data.title: Iran's central bank purchased $507M in USDT to support rial amidst protests and rising crypto adoption.
data.description: Iran's Central Bank has accumulated over $500 million worth of USDT amidst rising demonstrations and increased cryptocurrency adoption within the nation.
